parameters.name: green4
parameters.label: Green4
parameters.description: Green output mix. Use these 4 values to mix the RGBA inputs into the output's green channel.

parameters.name: alpha4
parameters.label: Alpha4
parameters.description: Alpha output mix. Use these 4 values to mix the RGBA inputs into the output's alpha channel.

parameters.name: red4
parameters.label: Red4
parameters.description: Red output mix. Use these 4 values to mix the RGBA inputs into the output's red channel.

parameters.name: constant4
parameters.label: Constant4
parameters.description: Use these 4 values to add or subtract a constant amount to the output channels.

parameters.name: blue4
parameters.label: Blue4
parameters.description: Blue output mix. Use these 4 values to mix the RGBA inputs into the output's blue channel.
